content.content: Blogging personality who is famous for her To Vogue or Bust lifestyle blog. She has gained popularity across social media and on her site for her travel, fashion, and lifestyle blogging content. She began regularly blogging in 2010. She earned her bachelor's degree in psychology from the University of Victoria. She has seen her Instagram account amass more than 40,000 followers. She has partnered with Airbnb, Forever 21, and J. Crew on her To Vogue or Bust blogging site. She was originally born and raised in Canada. She gave birth to her first born, Callum in November 2020. She andIrene Pilaare both famous blogging personalities known for their fashion and lifestyle content.
